title: Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur
tagline: Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Avittathur Mahadeva Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated at Avittathur village of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India.
overview.description: Avittathur Mahadeva Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated at Avittathur village of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. Avittathur gramam (village) is one of the 64 original Brahmin settlements in the ancient Kerala. The Avittathur temple as well as Avittathur Gramam is equally famous like Thaliparamb gramam, Sukapuram gramam, Irinjalakuda gramam and Peruvanam gramam. Avittathur Mahadeva Temple is more than 2000 years old and four old inscriptions have been discovered.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Avittathur
topPlaces.description: Avittathur is a village in Mukundapuram taluk, Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It was one of the 64 original Brahmin settlement in the Kerala state.

topPlaces.name: Irinjalakuda
topPlaces.description: Irinjalakuda is a municipal town in Thrissur district, Kerala, India. It is the headquarters of Irinjalakuda Revenue Division, Thrissur Rural Police and Mukundapuram Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Parekkattukara
topPlaces.description: Parekkattukara is a small village in Thrissur district, Kerala, India, with a population of around 1,000 families. It is surrounded by other villages such as Kallettumkara, Muriyad, Karoor, Alathur, Manakulangara, and Tharayilakadu.

topPlaces.name: Kaduppassery
topPlaces.description: Kaduppassery is a village in Mukundapuram taluk, Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kallamkunnu
topPlaces.description: Kallamkunnu is a town in Kerala, India. It is the second-largest town in Nadavaramba and 15th-largest in Irinjalakuda.

topPlaces.name: Kallettumkara
topPlaces.description: Kallettumkara is a village which is the epi-centre town of Aloor Panchayat and is in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala. Kaletumkara is the Western border of newly formed Chalakudy Taluk although it elects it Legislative Assembly Candidate from Irinjalakuda Constituency, India.

topPlaces.name: Thazhekad, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Thazhekad, is the site of one of the earliest St Thomas Christian communities in Kerala. Once a prosperous inland port, during heyday of Muziris.

topPlaces.name: Thripaya Trimurti Temple
topPlaces.description: Thripaya Trimurti Temple is a Hindu temple in Irinjalakuda, Thrissur in Kerala, India. It is one among the rare temples in the world where the Trimurti sit in one pedestal in one sanctum sanctorum.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur?
faq.a: Stays in Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahadeva Temple, Avittathur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avittathur, Irinjalakuda, Parekkattukara, Kaduppassery, Kallamkunnu.
